description: Style Note The polo shirt has ventured far from its athletic roots to secure a permanent place in our weekend wardrobe. fila's tees have been given a contemporary boost with a comfortable feel to boost. Wear it with tonal shorts or earthy chinos for an assured look on relaxed Saturday morning strolls Product Details White polo t-shirt that has a ribbed collar, short sleeves, half buttoned placket, a red stripe across the chest extending diagonally downwards towards the left hem and printed branding on the left sleeve Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash below 40 degrees with like colours using  mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry or bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Dry clean if necessary Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height:6' and shoulders: 18") is wearing a size M
